# `/give` Command
Gives an item to a player.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/give <player: target> <itemName: Item> [amount: int] [data: int] [components: json]`

## Arguments
- `amount`: int
- `components`: json
- `data`: int
- `itemName`: [Item](../enums/Item.md)
- `player`: target
